title: Remove faint watermark image from header and service sections

requirements.summary: Remove the faint BM logo watermark background image from the SiteHeader component
acceptanceCriteria: The header no longer displays any faint watermark background image
The header maintains its existing layout and styling without the watermark

file_operations.description: Remove all watermark-related CSS classes (watermark-bg-primary, watermark-bg-light, or watermark-bg-dark) from className attributes in the component. Remove any inline styles or background-image properties that reference the faint BM logo watermark.

requirements.summary: Remove the faint BM logo watermark background image from the ServicesPage component
acceptanceCriteria: The Services page no longer displays any faint watermark background image
All service cards and content remain visible and properly styled

file_operations.description: Remove all watermark-related CSS classes (watermark-bg-primary, watermark-bg-light, or watermark-bg-dark) from className attributes in the component. Remove any inline styles or background-image properties that reference the faint BM logo watermark or the asset frontend/public/assets/generated/BMLOGO-2-faint.dim_800x800.png.

file_operations.description: Remove the custom watermark utility classes (watermark-bg-primary, watermark-bg-light, watermark-bg-dark) that create semi-transparent background images using the BM logo. Delete all CSS rules and definitions related to these watermark classes while preserving all other Tailwind configuration and custom styling.
